name: TriptokCard
subtitle: Original tactical card arena for TriptokForge

roles.name: Leader
roles.summary: Your named anchor card. Only one Leader starts active and defines deck identity.

roles.name: General
roles.summary: The strategic support commander that amplifies your Leader and unlocks formation bonuses.

roles.name: Unit
roles.summary: Board presence cards that attack lanes, hold zones, and absorb pressure.

roles.name: Tactic
roles.summary: Fast-play reaction cards used during clash and resolve windows.

roles.name: Field
roles.summary: Persistent arena conditions that reshape tempo, geography, and resource flow.

roles.name: Relic
roles.summary: Artifact-grade upgrades that add passives, conversions, and triggered bursts.

roles.name: Primordial
roles.summary: Late-cycle mythic manifestations that swing the board and define finish conditions.

essences.name: Ember
essences.identity: Burst damage, aggro lines, ignition chains

genes.name: Riftborn
genes.identity: High-volatility lineage tuned for portals, blink movement, and aggressive openings.

genes.name: Wildcore
genes.identity: Organic growth line built around Verdant scaling, packs, and habitat spread.

genes.name: Synthetic
genes.identity: Clean machine lineage that rewards sequencing, precision, and relic loops.

genes.name: Prime
genes.identity: Heroic first-line genome for direct combat, banners, and high floor consistency.

genes.name: Echo
genes.identity: Memory-driven line that duplicates tactics, recurs bursts, and extends resolve windows.

genes.name: Relicbound
genes.identity: Artifact-linked bloodline built around gear, field control, and ancient awakenings.

archetypes.label: Adaptive
archetypes.copy: Balanced shell that can pivot between pressure and board control.

archetypes.label: Aggro
archetypes.copy: Fast pressure, low curve, aggressive tactic chains.

archetypes.label: Control
archetypes.copy: Longer games, stronger reaction timing, higher shield and field value.

archetypes.label: Combo
archetypes.copy: Synergy-first shell that aims to line up relic, tactic, and primordial spikes.

turn_flow: Deploy one Leader or Unit alignment action.
Open the Command window for General, Field, and Relic plays.
Enter Clash where Units and Leaders pressure lanes.
Use Tactics during Reaction and Resolve windows.
Stabilize the board, score field advantages, and end the round.
